sentences.arabic: شَهِدَ عَالَمُ الصَّيْدَلَةِ طَفْرَةً نَوْعِيَّةً بَعْدَ أَنْ كَانَ يَعْتَمِدُ لِقُرُونٍ طَوِيلَةٍ عَلَى الْأَعْشَابِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ وَالْوَصَفَاتِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svijet farmacije doživio je kvalitativni skok nakon što se vijekovima oslanjao na prirodno bilje i tradicionalne recepte.
sentences.translationEn: The world of pharmacy has witnessed a qualitative leap after relying for long centuries on natural herbs and traditional recipes.

sentences.arabic: وَتَخْضَعُ الْأَدْوِيَةُ الْحَدِيثَةُ لِسِلْسِلَةٍ مَقْنَنَةٍ مِنَ التَّجَارِبِ السَّرِيرِيَّةِ الصَّارِمَةِ لِضَمَانِ كَفَاءَتِهَا وَتَقْلِيلِ آثَارِهَا الْجَانِبِيَّةِ إِلَى أَدْنَى الْمُسْتَوَيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Moderni lijekovi prolaze kroz regulisani niz strogih kliničkih ispitivanja kako bi se osigurala njihova efikasnost i smanjile nuspojave na najniži nivo.
sentences.translationEn: Modern medicines undergo a regulated series of rigorous clinical trials to ensure their efficacy and reduce their side effects to the lowest levels.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَنْحَصِرُ دَوْرُ الصَّيْدَلِيِّ فِي صَرْفِ الْعِلَاجِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ يَمْتَدُّ لِيَشْمَلَ تَوْجِيهَ الْمَرْضَى حَوْلَ التَّدَاخُلَاتِ الدَّوَائِيَّةِ الْمُحْتَمَلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Uloga farmaceuta nije ograničena samo na izdavanje terapije, već se proteže na savjetovanje pacijenata o mogućim interakcijama lijekova.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist's role is not limited to dispensing treatment only, but extends to include guiding patients about potential drug interactions.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ظُهُورِ مُعْضِلَةِ مُقَاوَمَةِ الْمُضَادَّاتِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ، بَاتَ مِنَ الْوَاجِبِ التَّقَيُّدُ بِالْجُرُعَاتِ الْمُحَدَّدَةِ وَعَدَمُ تَنَاوُلِ الدَّوَاءِ دُونَ اسْتِشَارَةٍ طِبِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: S pojavom problema rezistencije na antibiotike, postalo je obavezno pridržavati se propisanih doza i ne uzimati lijekove bez ljekarskog savjeta.
sentences.translationEn: With the emergence of the antibiotic resistance dilemma, it has become mandatory to adhere to specified doses and not take medication without medical consultation.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ مُسْتَقْبَلَ الطِّبِّ يَتَّجِهُ نَحْوَ الْعِلَاجَاتِ الْجِينِيَّةِ الْمُخَصَّصَةِ، مِمَّا يَعِدُ بِثَوْرَةٍ فِي عِلَاجِ الْأَمْرَاضِ الَّتِي كَانَتْ تُعْتَبَرُ مُسْتَعْصِيَةً فِي السَّابِقِ.
sentences.translation: Budućnost medicine kreće se ka personalizovanim genetskim terapijama, što obećava revoluciju u liječenju bolesti koje su se ranije smatrale neizlječivim.
sentences.translationEn: The future of medicine is moving toward personalized genetic treatments, promising a revolution in treating diseases that were previously considered incurable.
